      Contributing to charlatan Creating realistic data
    • Changelog

    Create fake jobs

    Source: R/job.R
    ch_job.Rd

    Create fake jobs

    Usage

    ch_job(n = 1, locale = NULL)

    Arguments

    n

    (integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

    locale

    (character) the locale to use. Run JobProvider$new()$allowed_locales() for locales supported (default: en_US)

    See also

    JobProvider

    Examples

    ch_job()
#> [1] "Futures trader"
ch_job(10)
#>  [1] "Administrator, arts"            "Water quality scientist"       
#>  [3] "Teaching laboratory technician" "Broadcast journalist"          
#>  [5] "Clinical embryologist"          "Accounting technician"         
#>  [7] "Chartered certified accountant" "Proofreader"                   
#>  [9] "Therapist, drama"               "Personal assistant"            
# or even ch_job(500)

ch_job(locale = "da_DK", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Indkøbsassistent"     "Smed"                 "Projektadministrator"
#>  [4] "Elevatormontør"       "Anklager"             "Molekylærbiolog"     
#>  [7] "Områdeansvarlig"      "Bogholder"            "CRM-konsulent"       
#> [10] "Chefprojektleder"    
ch_job(locale = "fi_FI", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Majakkateknikko"           "Mareografihoitaja"        
#>  [3] "Gm huto pääkäyttäjä"       "Ultraäänihoitaja"         
#>  [5] "Sairaala-apulainen"        "Upseeri"                  
#>  [7] "Raportoinnin asiantuntija" "Raideliikennejohtaja"     
#>  [9] "Cc-yritysneuvoja"          "Innoittaja"               
ch_job(locale = "fr_FR", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Ingénieur"                                     
#>  [2] "Conducteur"                                    
#>  [3] "Ingénieur hydrogéomorphologue"                 
#>  [4] "Teinturier"                                    
#>  [5] "Agent de propreté et d'hygiène"                
#>  [6] "Maître  d'hôtel"                               
#>  [7] "Ingénieur hydroécologue"                       
#>  [8] "Ingénieur technico-commerciale en électronique"
#>  [9] "Gardien de la paix"                            
#> [10] "Gestionnaire de contrats d'assurance"          
ch_job(locale = "fr_CH", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Praticien sur bois AFP"                         
#>  [2] "Conseiller en organisation avec diplôme fédéral"
#>  [3] "Maquilleur professionnel avec brevet fédéral"   
#>  [4] "Cordonnier CFC"                                 
#>  [5] "Electroplaste avec brevet fédéral"              
#>  [6] "Thermiste avec brevet fédéral"                  
#>  [7] "Agent de détention avec brevet fédéral"         
#>  [8] "Nettoyeur de textiles CFC"                      
#>  [9] "Télématicien diplômé"                           
#> [10] "Marbrier, maître"                               
ch_job(locale = "hr_HR", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Sportski trener"                      
#>  [2] "Medicinski biokemičar"                
#>  [3] "Medicinska sestra-medicinski tehničar"
#>  [4] "Galanterist"                          
#>  [5] "Stručnjak zaštite na radu"            
#>  [6] "Viši preparator"                      
#>  [7] "Stalni sudski vještak"                
#>  [8] "Mehaničar poljoprivredne mehanizacije"
#>  [9] "Pomoćni djelatnik"                    
#> [10] "Muzejski tehničar"                    
ch_job(locale = "fa_IR", n = 10)
#>  [1] "معاون"       "نجار"        "کارمند"      "دندان\fپزشک" "گروهبان"    
#>  [6] "کشاورز"      "غواص"        "مهندس"       "دربان"       "پزشک"       
ch_job(locale = "pl_PL", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Kowboj"                             "Architekt wnętrz"                  
#>  [3] "Konsultant"                         "Doradca podatkowy w Polsce"        
#>  [5] "Certyfikator energetyczny"          "Ankieter"                          
#>  [7] "Pośrednik finansowy"                "Audytor efektywności energetycznej"
#>  [9] "Hostessa"                           "Barista"                           
ch_job(locale = "ru_RU", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Преподаватель" "Дознаватель"   "Травматолог"   "Сурдопедагог" 
#>  [5] "Иммунолог"     "Кинолог"       "Ортопед"       "Маркетолог"   
#>  [9] "Блоггер"       "Травматолог"  
ch_job(locale = "uk_UA", n = 10)
#>  [1] "Редактор"  "Економіст" "Астронавт" "Географ"   "Кушнір"    "Паралегал"
#>  [7] "Адвокат"   "Геофізик"  "Лікар"     "Льотчик"  
ch_job(locale = "zh_TW", n = 10)
#>  [1] "節目製作人員"         "社會／人類學研究人員" "太陽能技術工程師"    
#>  [4] "廣告AE業務人員"       "美髮工作者"           "排版人員"            
#>  [7] "升學補習班老師"       "聲學／噪音工程師"     "壓鑄模具技術人員"    
#> [10] "驗光師"
